answers.where: Old Gate Town Square, a fantasy quest hub with the Gate Warden, route strip, Road Wolf target, and locked Mine route visible.
answers.action: Accept the wolf quest from the quest rail, then travel to North Road and run the automated Road Wolf battle.
answers.response: Live captures prove quest accepted feedback, travel to North Road, victory loot, readable equip/claim controls, locked route feedback, and transient reward feedback.
answers.reward: The first loop previews XP, gold, and the Rusty Iron Ring; after victory the loot card, equip button, and claim button are readable and separated.
answers.game_look: The native runtime now presents painted location art, character/enemy sprites, fantasy HUD bars, framed route plaques, parchment quest rail, reward icon, and game-styled CTA buttons from the packed atlas.

issues.text: Some generated cutout edges are still prototype-quality rather than final release art.
Progression panel, modal/choice, and resume/re-entry remain explicit debt beyond this first slice.

not_covered.reason: First slice exposes inline reward/equip progression; no separate inventory/progression panel exists yet.
First slice uses direct primary actions and has no modal or choice dialog.
Resume/re-entry behavior is out of scope for this first native slice.

problem: Minor polish remains: progression/modal/resume are explicit first-slice debt, and some generated cutout edges are not final-release art quality.
next: Proceed only to the next narrow Ember Road gameplay/content slice, while keeping future visual states under the same live-state gate.
